nodes.label: Catatan penting
nodes.rationale: Every published Sanskrit or translation field must have a clear, lawful source and draft content must remain visibly marked.

nodes.label: Tahap sebelum pembungkusan aplikasi
nodes.rationale: Stabilize the web application, privacy, offline behavior, notifications, and accessibility before native wrapping.

nodes.label: iOS dan Android
nodes.rationale: Use Capacitor only after the web app is stable so iOS and Android can share the primary codebase.

nodes.label: Intro Motion Experience
nodes.rationale: A separate visual introduction presents the product before the user enters the practical reading dashboard.

nodes.label: Personal Dashboard
nodes.rationale: The reading room is the operational dashboard; back navigation should return here rather than replaying the intro.

nodes.label: Random Sloka Reels
nodes.rationale: Random verses use a full-screen, scroll-snapping mobile flow inspired by short-form vertical feeds.

nodes.label: Account Data Synchronization
nodes.rationale: Saved verses, notes, and agenda records are scoped to the authenticated Supabase user while retaining local fallback data.

nodes.label: Pawukon Recurrence
nodes.rationale: Otonan, odalan, and other pawukon events recur from Sapta Wara, Panca Wara, and Wuku signatures on a 210-day cycle.

nodes.label: Dewasa Search
nodes.rationale: Dewasa results are guidance linked to external calendar sources, not absolute ritual decisions.

nodes.label: Upakara and Prayers
nodes.rationale: Ritual guidance must respect desa kala patra and the authority of qualified religious practitioners.

nodes.label: Sacred Counsel Between Krishna and Arjuna
nodes.norm_label: sacred counsel between krishna and arjuna

nodes.label: Bhagavad Gita and Balinese Cultural Fusion
nodes.norm_label: bhagavad gita and balinese cultural fusion

hyperedges.label: Gītā Bali Calendar and Family Agenda Flow
